---
title: "Breno A. H. Marisguia"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral fellow – PPGCP | UFMG"
---

## About

![](marisguia.jpg){fig-alt="Breno A. H. Marisguia" .profile-photo}

I am a postdoctoral fellow in the [Graduate Program in Political Science](http://ppgcp.fafich.ufmg.br/indexi.php) at the Federal University of Minas Gerais, where I also received my Ph.D. in Political Science.

My research focuses on comparative politics, political institutions, and presidential interruptions in Latin America. I also work on research methods, epistemology, Qualitative Comparative Analysis (QCA), and computational tools that make social science research more transparent, systematic, and auditable.

Alongside my academic research, I have collaborated on applied projects concerning public-sector leadership, legislative-regulatory competencies, lobbying regulation, social policy evaluation, and democratic institutions in Brazil. I am also the developer of qcaERT, an R package for robustness assessment in QCA.

## Research Interests

- Research methods
- Comparative politics
- Epistemology
- Presidentialism
- Legislative studies

## Contact

- [GitHub](https://github.com/marisguia)
- Email: marisguiabreno@gmail.com
